name: Rubble Trouble
author: Poki
description: Rubble Trouble is a puzzle destruction game in which you join the Boss, Barry and the rest of the crew as they destroy buildings around the city. Every level, the building to destroy will be different but you'll also have different tools at your disposal. Occasionally, a construction worker will stand within the buildings - so be careful to not explode them! Can you help the crew destroy every building? How to play Rubble Trouble? Use the mouse to destroy different parts of the buildings! Who created Rubble Trouble? Rubble Trouble was created by Nitrome. Play their other game on Poki: bucket, Canopy and sqauwk How can I play Rubble Trouble for free? You can play Rubble Trouble for free on Poki. Can I play Rubble Trouble on mobile devices and desktop? Rubble Trouble can be played on your computer.
